attribution: Rainfall by NOAA CPC (Climate Prediction Center Global Unified Gauge-Based Analysis, public domain); temperature and humidity by NASA POWER (MERRA-2 / GMAO, public domain)
disclaimer: Weather-driven environmental favourability sub-scores per disease family, for city-level screening and comparison. One input to the Fever Watch risk indicator, not a disease forecast, a case count, or an individual health estimate.

scoring_config._comment: Transparent, tunable weather-shaping per disease family (NOT machine learning). Each family maps trailing daily weather into a 0-100 environmental-favourability sub-score that feeds the 'weather' signal of the consolidation engine. Mosquito: unimodal temperature response peaking near temp_optimal_c, times lagged rainfall (standing water) and humidity. Waterborne: recent plus lagged rainfall as a contamination proxy, temperature minor. Febrile: humidity and day-to-day temperature variability. Refine weights against intuition during the weather eyeball pass.
